failure_scenarios.description: The 'Fortress North America' energy self-sufficiency narrative collapses as the Iran shock proves more durable than expected, causing HY energy-sector issuers (which face input cost spikes despite being domestic producers) to default in clusters, shattering the prevailing bullish thesis for US HY credit.
